heading: Overseas Security Electronic Bulletin Board
label: 5511 Overseas Security Electronic Bulletin Board
text: Not later than 60 days after , the Secretary of State shall issue such rules and regulations as may be necessary to establish, under the Bureau of Consular Affairs, an electronic bulletin board accessible to the general public. Such bulletin board shall contain all information, updated daily, which is available on the Overseas Security Electronic Bulletin Board of the Bureau of Diplomatic Security.November 16, 1990
notes: Authority of Secretary of StateExcept as otherwise provided, Secretary of State to have and exercise any authority vested by law in any official or office of Department of State and references to such officials or offices deemed to refer to Secretary of State or Department of State, as appropriate, see and , set out as a note under .section 2651a of this titlesection 161(d) of Pub.
